# visual_evidence_readability_preflight

```yaml
status: passed_with_human_review_required_for_small_source_text_and_partial_project_paths
safe_crop_applied: "crop=2400:1350:510:230,scale=1920:1080"
evidence_visible: true
full_screen_masking_used: false
source_text_readability:
  opening_workbench: medium
  chopper_case: high
  report_workflow_pages: medium_to_low
human_review_required_for:
  - dense report/workflow text at approximately 120s-260s
  - whether card style is acceptable despite remaining visual deviation
  - whether partial project-relative paths are acceptable on platform
```
